name: Sweet Potatoes Baked w. Lemon Ny Times
recipeInstructions:
-------------
1. Rinse the potatoes under warm water. Place in a large pot, cover with cold water and bring to boil. Reduce heat and simmer until potatoes are tender, about 30 minutes. Drain and let cool.
2. In a saucepan over medium heat, combine the sugar, 1/2 cup water, nutmeg, lemon rind, and salt. Simmer for 10 minutes. Add 5 tbsp of the butter and stir well. When the butter has melted, remove from heat, beat in the lemon juice, and set aside.
3. Preheat oven to 425°F. Peel the sweet potatoes and slice into 1/2-inch discs. Use the remaining butter to grease a shallow baking dish. Lay the sliced sweet potatoes in a single layer, pour the lemon syrup on top, and bake for 30 minutes until bubbling hot.
